description_long: This rifle features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly matte black finish and subtle red and blue accent lights. The body is robust and streamlined, with a prominent scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, forming a smooth, rounded end that suggests a bullpup configuration. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a compact muzzle device, likely a suppressor or flash hider. The grip is ergonomic and positioned below the main body, with a trigger guard and magazine well visible. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, black, futuristic rifle with a mounted scope, integrated stock, and long barrel, accented by subtle red and blue lights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, ergonomic grip, and integrated stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle device, barrel alignment, and illuminated accents on the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, grip, and the smooth, rounded rear stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded stock end and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
